# SocialMate

> Free social media scheduling and Creator OS — schedule, create, and manage content across 5 live platforms with 20+ built-in AI tools, an autonomous AI content system (SOMA), and an autonomous trading bot (Enki).

SocialMate is a web-based social media management platform built for creators, streamers, small businesses, and agencies. Free to start. No credit card required. No per-channel fees.

Live at: https://socialmate.studio
Launched: March 26, 2026
Company: Gilgamesh Enterprise LLC (Wyoming LLC)
Founder: Joshua Bostic
Contact: socialmate.updates@gmail.com

## What SocialMate Does

- Schedule and publish posts to Bluesky, Discord, Telegram, Mastodon, and X/Twitter (5 platforms live)
- Compose with thread builder, per-platform preview, save-as-template, and post-as-image (PNG export)
- Clips Studio: browse Twitch clips (OAuth) or YouTube videos (channel URL, no API key) and schedule them to all platforms in one click
- 20+ AI-powered tools: caption generation, hashtag suggestions, post rewriter, viral hook generator, thread generator, content repurposer (6 formats), post scorer, SM-Pulse, SM-Radar, content gap detector, AI content calendar, AI image generation, brand voice injection
- Smart Queue: auto-schedule drafts into 14-day/30-day windows at platform-optimal times (Pro+)
- Recurring posts: repeat posts daily/weekly/bi-weekly/monthly with optional end dates
- Bulk scheduler — upload and schedule many posts at once with per-platform character limit enforcement
- Link in Bio page builder — free on all plans, click analytics, QR code
- Competitor tracking — track up to 3 competitor accounts on free plan, with engagement alerts
- Evergreen recycling — mark posts as evergreen and they auto-requeue when schedule is empty
- RSS/blog import — pull from any RSS or Atom feed and turn into scheduled posts
- Team collaboration — multi-seat, role-based access (Owner/Admin/Editor/Viewer/Client), content approval workflows
- Client workspaces — isolated workspaces per client (Agency plan)
- Social inbox — unified Bluesky, Mastodon, Telegram, Discord mentions/replies with inline reply
- Creator Studio video editor — trim, CSS filters, caption overlay, export via MediaRecorder
- Link shortener — create short links at socialmate.studio/go/[slug] with click counter
- Media library — upload and reuse images/videos across posts
- A/B post variant testing — publish two versions 24h apart, auto-declare winner (Pro+)
- Analytics — X-style SVG dashboard, posting streaks (GitHub-style 365-day heatmap), Content DNA (engagement fingerprint), best times heatmap, platform breakdown, per-post performance alerts
- Workspace activity feed — full audit log of every team action
- Posting streak tracker — current streak, longest streak, contribution graph
- Schedule templates — save and reuse posting-time presets
- Browser push notifications — get notified on publish, Enki signals, streak alerts, team approvals
- 29 sidebar color themes
- Collapsible sidebar with icon-only mode
- 5-step onboarding tour
- 3-email onboarding drip (welcome, day 2 tip, day 5 check-in)
- Weekly digest email every Sunday (posts, streak, top post preview)

## SOMA — Autonomous AI Content System

SOMA is SocialMate's autonomous content generation layer. It learns your brand voice, ingests your source material, and generates a full week of platform-native posts on your schedule.

Landing page: https://socialmate.studio/soma

### How SOMA Works
1. Identity Interview — 5-step onboarding to capture brand voice, tone, audience, and style
2. Create a Project — define target platforms, posting frequency, and per-platform schedule
3. Ingest Source Material — paste or upload docs; SOMA performs Gemini-powered diff analysis against your master doc, storing versioned history
4. Generate — SOMA generates a full week of platform-native posts in one call; posts go into your approval queue
5. Review & Approve — review queue in Safe mode, or let Autopilot/Full Send schedule automatically

### SOMA Modes
- Safe Mode (free) — generates content for manual review; you approve each post
- Autopilot ($10/month) — automatically schedules approved content; runs weekly on Monday
- Full Send ($20/month) — maximum posting cadence; bypasses approval queue

### SOMA Credit Costs (uses SocialMate AI credits)
- Ingest document: 25 credits
- Generate full week: 75 credits
- Update voice profile: 15 credits
- Single post generation: 5 credits
- Full weekly run total: ~100 credits

### SOMA Projects
- Named projects per client or brand
- Per-platform schedule: posts/day + day picker (Every day / Mon–Fri / Weekends / Custom) per platform
- Doc history with versioned diffs
- Run caps to prevent over-posting
- Only shows platforms you have connected

### SOMA Pages
- Dashboard: https://socialmate.studio/soma
- New project: https://socialmate.studio/soma/projects/new
- Project detail: https://socialmate.studio/soma/projects/[id]
- Weekly view: https://socialmate.studio/soma/weekly
- Upgrade: https://socialmate.studio/soma/upgrade

## Enki — Autonomous Trading Bot

Companion product by Gilgamesh Enterprise LLC. Self-contained autonomous trading bot for US stocks.

Landing page: https://socialmate.studio/enki
Public leaderboard: https://socialmate.studio/enki/leaderboard

### Enki Tiers
- Citizen: free paper trading (simulated trades)
- Commander: $15/month — live signal alerts, full quant engine
- Emperor: $29/month — highest position sizing, priority signals
- Cloud Runner: $10/month — cloud-based automated execution

### Enki Features
- Quant engine: ADX filter, TP Ladder (TP1/TP2 partial exits), Kelly position sizing
- Correlation Guard (Pearson > 0.85 blocks correlated positions)
- DCA averaging, Sharpe/Sortino tracking
- Trailing stops: ATR-based, tightens after TP hits
- Session filter (9:30–16:00 EST), re-entry cooldown
- Daily 3% + portfolio 12% drawdown limits
- Guardian mode (Fortress Guard) — requires approval before any trade
- Truth Mode — 15-min live scan for momentum + mean reversion signals using Yahoo Finance OHLCV; equity curve with SPY overlay; per-strategy stats (target: 50 trades per strategy for statistical validity)
- Trade history with FIFO P&L calculation, win rate, 25/page pagination
- Weekly P&L summary email every Monday

### Enki Pages
- Dashboard: https://socialmate.studio/enki
- Doctrines: https://socialmate.studio/enki/doctrines
- Truth Mode: https://socialmate.studio/enki/truth
- Trade history: https://socialmate.studio/enki/trades
- Settings: https://socialmate.studio/enki/settings
- Leaderboard: https://socialmate.studio/enki/leaderboard

## Studio Stax

Curated directory of creator tools and resources. Founder-approved listings ranked by SM-Give donation amounts and listing age. Lister portal for submitting your own tool.

- Directory: https://socialmate.studio/studio-stax
- Apply to list: https://socialmate.studio/studio-stax/apply
- Pricing: Founding Member $100/yr · Standard $150/yr

## SM-Give

Built-in charitable initiative. 2% of all subscription revenue and 75% of merch revenue go to charitable causes (homeless, single parents, underprivileged schools). Users can make voluntary in-app donations.

- SM-Give tracker: https://socialmate.studio/give

## Merch

SocialMate branded merchandise via Printify print-on-demand. 75% of gross merch revenue goes to SM-Give.

- Merch store: https://socialmate.studio/merch

## Gilgamesh's Guide

Free guide for entrepreneurs, creators, and self-starters by founder Joshua Bostic. Covers vibe-coding, AI tools, building without permission, and the bootstrapped founder mindset.

- Landing page: https://socialmate.studio/gils-guide

## Referral & Affiliate Program

- 30% recurring commission on all subscription payments
- Milestone: 100+ active recurring referrals → 40% forever
- 10% flat on Starter + Popular credit packs
- 15% flat on Pro + Max credit packs
- Affiliate dashboard: https://socialmate.studio/partners/dashboard
- Affiliate landing: https://socialmate.studio/affiliates
- Referral landing: https://socialmate.studio/refer/[code]

## Creator Monetization Hub

Coming soon: tip jar, fan subscriptions, paywalled posts. Waitlist at https://socialmate.studio/monetize

## Platforms

### Live Now
- Bluesky
- Discord
- Telegram
- Mastodon
- X/Twitter (pay-per-use, $0.01/tweet, quota enforced by plan: Free 28/mo · Pro 150/mo · Agency 400/mo)

### Coming Soon
- TikTok (API submitted for review April 2026)
- LinkedIn (API application pending)
- YouTube posting
- Instagram
- Facebook
- Threads
- Reddit
- Pinterest

## Pricing

- Free: $0/month — 50 AI credits/month, 2 team seats, link in bio, all core features
- Pro: $5/month or $55/year — 500 AI credits/month, 5 seats, Smart Queue, Brand Voice, A/B testing
- Agency: $20/month or $209/year — 2,000 AI credits/month, 15 seats, 5 client workspaces
- White Label Basic: +$20/month — custom logo, colors, branding
- White Label Pro: +$40/month — custom domain + everything above
- AI Credit Packs: $1.99 (100cr), $4.99 (300cr), $9.99 (750cr), $19.99 (2,000cr)
- X Booster add-ons (one-time, roll over): Spark 50 posts/$1.99 · Boost 120/$4.99 · Surge 250/$9.99 · Storm 500/$19.99
- SOMA Autopilot: $10/month
- SOMA Full Send: $20/month
